title: Federation peer version-compatibility check
description: User has stated Mac Studio runs an older sweech that must NOT be updated. The dashboard's federation panel must gracefully degrade when peers don't expose /fed/dashboard/state. Add a `version` field to /fed/announce + /fed/dashboard/state responses. Dashboard renders peer cards with: green check + version when compatible, yellow chip + 'older' when peer version < this version, red + 'unreachable' when no response. Tooltip explains what's missing per version gap. 8+ tests.

context.text: Filed via /vy-backlog final-pass 2026-05-18. Gap surfaced in 48h-conversation audit.
